sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n53035" key="kamyi/ouros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καμψί-ουρος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῐ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n53035.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bending the tail</tr_>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">σκίουρος</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
